item.title: Turning a Forgotten Trailer Into a Gem
item.description: A restoration project focused on bringing an abandoned or worn trailer back to usable condition. The video highlights cleaning, repairs, and transformation work step by step. What part of a restoration do you enjoy most?

media:content.media:title: Turning a Forgotten Trailer Into a Gem
media:content.media:description: A restoration project focused on bringing an abandoned or worn trailer back to usable condition. The video highlights cleaning, repairs, and transformation work step by step. What part of a restoration do you enjoy most?

item.title: Semi Truck Boat Conversion Explained
item.description: A breakdown of an unusual engineering project converting a semi truck into a boat. The video explores design challenges, fabrication work, and how the concept is made functional. What’s the most unusual vehicle conversion you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Boat Conversion Explained
media:content.media:description: A breakdown of an unusual engineering project converting a semi truck into a boat. The video explores design challenges, fabrication work, and how the concept is made functional. What’s the most unusual vehicle conversion you’ve seen?

item.title: Boots Are Manufactured Like This
item.description: A look at how boots are manufactured, with attention to the process and production details. What stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: Boots Are Manufactured Like This
media:content.media:description: A look at how boots are manufactured, with attention to the process and production details. What stands out most to you?

item.title: Thunderhead289 V8 Lawn Mower Carb Build
item.description: Thunderhead289 fits a lawnmower carb to a V8 and reports 35-45 mpg. A practical look at the setup and what it takes to make the modification work. How does the carb swap change the build?

media:content.media:title: Thunderhead289 V8 Lawn Mower Carb Build
media:content.media:description: Thunderhead289 fits a lawnmower carb to a V8 and reports 35-45 mpg. A practical look at the setup and what it takes to make the modification work. How does the carb swap change the build?

item.title: From Shell to Road-Ready Build in 15 Days
item.description: A hands-on garage build turns an empty shell into a road-ready project in 15 days, with the focus on the work, modifications, and mechanical steps along the way. What would you tackle first?

media:content.media:title: From Shell to Road-Ready Build in 15 Days
media:content.media:description: A hands-on garage build turns an empty shell into a road-ready project in 15 days, with the focus on the work, modifications, and mechanical steps along the way. What would you tackle first?

item.title: LS3 Engine Ignition and Startup
item.description: Showing an LS3 engine ignition moment, focusing on the engine build and startup process. A straightforward look at the mechanical work behind the project. What details stand out to you?

media:content.media:title: LS3 Engine Ignition and Startup
media:content.media:description: Showing an LS3 engine ignition moment, focusing on the engine build and startup process. A straightforward look at the mechanical work behind the project. What details stand out to you?

item.title: 1971 Land Rover Glory
item.description: 1971 Land Rover Glory, featuring hands-on garage work and automotive restoration details. A look at the build and mechanical process behind this classic Land Rover. What would you inspect first?

media:content.media:title: 1971 Land Rover Glory
media:content.media:description: 1971 Land Rover Glory, featuring hands-on garage work and automotive restoration details. A look at the build and mechanical process behind this classic Land Rover. What would you inspect first?

item.title: The Ford That Left Us by the Side of the Road
item.description: A Ford project runs into trouble and leaves the crew working through the issue on the roadside. A straightforward look at the problem, the diagnosis, and the hands-on repair process. What went wrong?

media:content.media:title: The Ford That Left Us by the Side of the Road
media:content.media:description: A Ford project runs into trouble and leaves the crew working through the issue on the roadside. A straightforward look at the problem, the diagnosis, and the hands-on repair process. What went wrong?

item.title: Will This 1984 K-Wagon Run and Drive?
item.description: A hands-on look at whether this 1984 K-Wagon can run and drive, with focus on the mechanical checks and build condition. What will it take to get it moving?

media:content.media:title: Will This 1984 K-Wagon Run and Drive?
media:content.media:description: A hands-on look at whether this 1984 K-Wagon can run and drive, with focus on the mechanical checks and build condition. What will it take to get it moving?

item.title: How To Make A Muscle Car Even Cooler
item.description: A look at adding A/C installation to a muscle car and the hands-on work involved in the build. Follow the modification process and see how the project comes together. What would you add next?

media:content.media:title: How To Make A Muscle Car Even Cooler
media:content.media:description: A look at adding A/C installation to a muscle car and the hands-on work involved in the build. Follow the modification process and see how the project comes together. What would you add next?

item.title: Bronco Prepped for the Next Garage Build
item.description: Bronco is getting ready for the ride ahead as the build moves forward. A straightforward look at the prep and mechanical work involved. What changes are next?

media:content.media:title: Bronco Prepped for the Next Garage Build
media:content.media:description: Bronco is getting ready for the ride ahead as the build moves forward. A straightforward look at the prep and mechanical work involved. What changes are next?
